name: beui-bloom-menu
title: Bloom Menu
author: Saurabh Chauhan
description: Morphs a compact trigger into a caller-supplied action palette with a radial reveal.

changes: Changed project aliases to bundled relative imports.
Removed upstream demo items and their icons from runtime; callers now supply every action.
Added configurable labels, dialog semantics, explicit focus entry and exit-complete restoration, controls linkage, hidden decorative icons, and visible focus styles.
Moved item blur interpolation off the spring to prevent invalid negative blur values.

modifications.change: Repointed shared imports, removed embedded demo content, completed focus and dialog behavior, and bounded blur interpolation.
modifications.reason: Ship a reusable component rather than source-owned sample data while keeping keyboard users inside a clear interaction flow.
